title: Beer
description: A beer product in the Wine Vybe database including brewery, style, and sensory attributes.

brewery.description: The brewery that produces the beer.

style.description: The beer style category (e.g., IPA, Stout, Pilsner, Abbey Ale, Dark Lager, Cider, Pale Ale, Trappist).

ibu.description: International Bitterness Units — a measure of hop bitterness.

description.description: A description of the beer's flavor, ingredients, and characteristics.

tastingNotes.description: Sensory notes describing aroma, flavor, and finish.

foodPairing.description: List of recommended food pairings for this beer.

awards.description: Awards and competition results for this beer.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the beer bottle or can.

shipping.description: Shipping specifications for the beer product.
